title: Dungeons, Creatures and Classes (DnD)
description: A D&D inspired RPG mod with Mobs, structures, classes and a lot more!
body:
[![youtube icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc5d2510cfabb835a1e8001506b7c3b6574ecd59.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@luderspieler)
[![discord server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/691871cb8485e502887fdc925360de07a79bc214.png)](https://discord.gg/fKCsbUauD7)

This mod is a fun addition to the game that adds some stuff from the Dungeons and Dragons universe.

Ingame class choosing GUI:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52f3ed649b474644372e45b574945e80c1c74b63.png)

# 🧙‍♂️ Dungeons, Creatures and Classes – Classes, Mobs & Magic Inspired by Dungeons & Dragons!

Experience Minecraft like never before with a full **Dungeons & Dragons** twist!  
Choose your class, develop powerful abilities, battle legendary creatures, and wield rare **Adamantium** weapons.  
Your adventure begins **right after world creation — and again after every death**. ⚔️📜

---

## 🧑‍🎤 CLASS SYSTEM

Upon world creation (and after each death), a GUI allows you to choose from several unique classes.  
Each class offers:

- 🛡️ **Unique attribute stats** (e.g., starting health)  
- 🎒 **Distinct starting gear**  
- 📈 **XP-based abilities** that unlock as you level up

### 🎵 Bard  
- Fights with **instruments** that trigger special effects  
- A versatile support-focused playstyle  
- **Starting gear:** instruments, food, healing potions, blocks, small weapons

### 🪓 Barbarian  
- Close-combat expert with powerful offense and defense  
- Strong, durable, and aggressive  
- **Starting gear:** weapons, food, healing potions, blocks, small weapons

### 📖 Magician  
- Casts **spells** using a **refined magic system**  
- Equipped with a **custom spellbook**  
- Strategic, long-range combat  
- **Starting gear:** spellbook, food, healing potions, blocks, small weapons

> 🧠 All classes gain new abilities and additional hearts through XP progression.  
> Starting health values vary between classes.

*More classes will become available in-game with future updates!*

---

## 👹 MOBS & ENEMIES

All mobs are directly based on creatures from **Dungeons & Dragons**, integrated into Minecraft’s real-time combat system.

### 🪓 Orcs & Ogres  
- Spawn primarily in **orc camps**, often side-by-side  
- Camps contain valuable loot like weapons, coins, and rare items

### 🐻 Owlbear  
- A fearsome hybrid of owl and bear  
- Roams freely in natural biomes such as forests and mountains

🧟‍♂️ *And many more creatures await discovery!*

---

## ⚔️ WEAPONS & ADAMANTIUM

Fight with a variety of classic **D&D-style weapons**, each of which can be upgraded to powerful **Adamantium versions**.

### 🪙 Adamantium Upgrade  
- Works like a Netherite upgrade, but exclusive to D&D weapons  
- Can be found in a rare structure: the **Adamantium Shrine**

---

## 💰 COINS & TRADING

Collect **coins** from generated structures or trade with villagers.  
Coins act as a currency to obtain special items and upgrades.

---

## 🛠️ ADDITIONAL INFO

- 🎮 Designed for **Forge 1.20.1** (upgrade to **NeoForge 1.21.1** planned)  
- ⚔️ Real-time combat system (not turn-based)  
- 🧭 Many more mobs, classes, items and systems are planned or already included

---
